allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: scaffold duplff workspace and core crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core error::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core models::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core progress::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core scanner::tests 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add directory scanner with ignore crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core hasher::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core deduper::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core ranker::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo test -p duplff-core actions::tests 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo clippy -p duplff-core -- -D warnings 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: scaffold duplff-cli crate

Add duplff-cli binary crate to the workspace with dependencies on
duplff-core, clap, ratatui, crossterm, humansize, and serde_json.
Minimal main.rs prints a placeholder message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo clippy -p duplff-cli -- -D warnings 2>&1)
